<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/financing/v2/applications/results"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.results</b> authority for authenticated user

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"createdFrom","in":"query","description":"createdFrom","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},{"name":"createdTo","in":"query","description":"createdTo","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},{"name":"onlyFinished","in":"query","description":"onlyFinished","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean"}}]}

  id={undefined}

>
